assertions.assertion: The web_app client has AccessTokenType = AccessTokenType.Reference
assertions.rationale: AccessTokenType = AccessTokenType.Reference is set on web_app.

assertions.assertion: The web_app client has AccessTokenLifetime set to 900 (15 minutes)
The ApiResource api1_resource has ApiSecrets with at least one Secret configured
assertions.rationale: ApiSecrets = { new Secret("api1_secret".Sha256()) } is configured on api1_resource.
